checkedConditions: `jcode-harness session show <id> --json` exists and is read-only/offline
Default output exposes metadata without transcript content
`--preview N` returns bounded visible message preview and hides system reminders
cargo fmt --check, focused e2e, cargo check -p jcode, docs/governance checks, and selfdev build passed
notes: The command is intentionally local-jcode-session only. Imported external session show support remains a follow-up because each source has different backing storage and privacy semantics.
